I tried a different therapist (Derek), after receiving contact from Lifemark. I would recommend him highly. He was knowledgeable and even asked me questions no other therapist has ever asked me, & I have been having massage for years.  Thanks for the assistance.

My physio Neha Sultana, was amazing as she was clear in describing and explaining the exercises for my knee injury. She also adjusts the pace of exercises based on the patients progress which really helps in staying consistent with the recommended exercises. If considering this Lifemark location, would suggest to specifically ask for her.

The staff are friendly, lovely people. The management has done them an injustice. The training has been overlooked in all aspects from administrating at the front desk to the qualifications of the therapists.
Poor scheduling, lack of personal interaction between therapist and patient. Due to the substandard and insufficient treatment I’ve not recovered quickly and scar tissue has grown around the joint. Consequently, I need another visit to the hospital for a very painful procedure to manipulate the knee to attain a range of motion, to where it should be at week 7 post-op. I will research my next provider for therapy after this next procedure.

I had a fantastic experience at Lifemark Physiotherapy in Toronto, located at Lawrence Plaza. The staff are professional, friendly, and really attentive to your needs. They take the time to explain treatments clearly and make you feel comfortable throughout your sessions. Thanks to their expert care, and a special thanks to Melanie for her exceptional care and support—she made a big difference in my recovery. I highly recommend this clinic to anyone seeking effective and personalized physiotherapy.

name: St. George Physiotherapy Clinic
description:
My experience at St. George Physio has been absolutely fantastic in all respects. Sameer has top-notch clinical skills and clearly cares about his patients. He took the time to get to know me personally and designed an effective exercise strategy to address my issues. He has also been happy to answer all of my questions with detailed and helpful information about the physiology behind the recovery process. All of the support staff at the clinic have been great as well - a super friendly vibe all around. I'm very happy to have found this place - thank-you!

One of the best physiotherapy clinics in downtown Toronto! Everyone is so warm and nice and accomodating! Also, very important, they are extremely punctual so there is no waiting time for your appointment. Special thanks to Sameer, who always takes the time to listen to your issues and to explain in detail what and why you have to follow a certain set of exercises. His treatment was instrumental to help me heal and stay healthy. Last, but not least, my thanks to Silvia whose expert use of the ultrasound greatly sped up my recovery.

Andrew and his team members are helpful, friendly and very accommodating with scheduling appointments for my daughter's ankle sprain injury. Advice were given for at-home recovery of function exercise which helps support timely recovery. Each appointment was useful, supportive, and involved careful assessment and recommendations for rehab exercises and progreses. The ankle recovery was faster than expected due to Andrew's excellent care and expert advice.  The clinic staff members are friendly and professional. The charges were reasonable and their invoices are clear and make it easier to submit for insurance reimbursement. Thank You!

I’ve had such a great experience here! Everyone is so nice and genuinely caring. My physiotherapist, Andrew, always takes his time, listens to my concerns, and makes sure I’m comfortable with every step of the treatment. You can tell he really cares about helping you recover properly. The front desk staff are amazing too; some of the best customer service I’ve experienced! They always do their best to schedule appointments around my personal routine and make everything super easy and stress-free. Highly recommend this place to anyone looking for quality care and a friendly environment!

Excellent work. When my mom Donna first visited Dr. Sameer she was not able to walk straight and her knee was crocket but after the first session she felt better. Now it has been 6 sessions and she is able to walk straight and her knees are feeling better and she has no more pain.

name: York Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation Centre
description:
I came to York Physio after a work injury and was amazed by the staff and Doctor that I worked with. Not only was staff super friendly and compassionate about what they do but Dr. Abe Soo was brilliant in getting me back to my full potential working with me week by week starting small and hand picking exercises and techniques to get me from 60% to 100% functionality. I had a wonderful experience, highly recommend!

This is my go to place for physio. I've been here over the past couple years for numerous needs. Excellent service excellent customer service. This visit is for my plantar fascists. Check them out.

Very helpful. Good at explaining things simply and easy to understand. My knee pain has never returned and my plantar fasciitis has improved so much. I will always come back here for any physio needs in the future.

A. Soo, PT knows his field well and provided a quick and honest assessment. I didn't need any physio therapy treatment and assessed this minutes into my $75 - 45 minute assessment appointment.

However, he only provided a few exercises. He said I should return for another appointment three (3) days later, and he would provide more exercises. Then possibly one final visit during which I'd be advised of further exercises.

I would have respected it more if he had used another 5 minutes and provided all exercises, since the very next set could be done within 3 days. Remember, he stated upfront that I didn't even need physio, but that some exercises would help with mobility. Thus, he could have provided all upfront, telling me to do them as they felt comfortable.

Instead he tried to stretch one appointment into 2-3. I didn't return to find out.

I really appreciate the physiotherapist Abe.He is such a good person, polite. He is doing a very good job to me , and to everybody. Since I came here , I improve so much. The clinic is very very clean. All the staff are good. Hope everybody come here.

name: Abilities Rehabilitation & Counselling Services
address: 248 First St, Unit 2, Midland, Ontario L4R 0A8
description:
I had a fantastic experience with Sue and the team at Abilities Rehabilitation in Midland. Their team was great to work with, made everything easy and stress-free. True professionals—would happily work with them again!

Abilities Rehab recently completed an OT assessment for a family member and we were totally impressed and completely satisfied with the support and professional service that we received. The assessment was very accurate and was pivotal for getting the support that my family member requires. Highly recommend Abilities Rehab.

Excellent and thorough work by staff. I really valued the multi-disciplinary support I received. Highly recommend this team!

name: Fit For Life Physiotherapy
address: 18 Plains Rd W UNIT #4, Burlington, ON L7T 0B3
description:
Great experience with Leslie Hughes for osteoporosis physio assessment and exercise programming.  Leslie is very knowledgeable; she spent time doing a thorough assessment and took into account what I hoped to achieve…all in a non intimidating, warm and fun environment.  Thoroughly recommend her if you are starting your osteoporosis journey and need support in developing an exercise program, including core, posture and strength and resistance training.

Natalie is a wonderfully patient caring physio. She took care to assess my problems and provided suggestions on how to improve my balance and gait. She used laser treatment on my heel which gave great relief.
I found this clinic very easy to deal with. The office staff were very pleasant also.

Wendy is absolutely beyond words incredible. Her patience, knowledge, treatment, kindness and understanding, is out of this world amazing. She goes above and beyond. I cannot say enough good things about her. I HIGHLY recommend Wendy if you’re in a situation postpartum with extreme pain and mobility issues. She takes the time to explain treatment options and plans. With her assistance, I’m dramatically improved and on the road to recovery. Thank YOU Wendy. ❤️

Everyone at Fit for Life provides excellent expert care. Nathalie, David and Melissa are compassionate, knowledgeable and capable. So glad to have found their services.

I have been going to Ally for four months and have found her extremely helpful, professional and encouraging.   She has helped me through knee surgery recovery and other problems and with her help I feel confident that I will recover soon.

name: Ace Sports Clinic Toronto
address: 1 St Clair Ave. West, Suite 302, Toronto, ON M4V 1K6, Canada
description:
I had a complex sports injury and the whole team at Ace Sports Clinic were awesome in my journey to a full recovery.  Their integrated approach across disciplines helped address all the elements required for my recovery.  They also have a lovely and welcoming culture - a real team and great pleasure to deal with.

I met Luke Fuller 2 years ago, and his treatments are truly world class. He has an extraordinary ability to assess, diagnose and treat in a way that delivers results. Lukes treatments are next level with a bedside manner that is unmatched. He immediately puts you at ease and builds instant trust. His approach is holistic, treating the whole body, and he works collaboratively with his outstanding team to ensure the best possible outcomes.

Ashly, the massage therapist is incredible, skilled, caring and an absolute pleasure to deal with. Tayla is fantastic as well, combining her strong osteo training with a natural ability to treat with results.
The entire team, from the front desk to every practitioner is warm, welcoming and always willing to help with whatever you need. From the moment you walk in the door you feel taken care of.

To say I highly recommend Ace Sports Clinic doesn’t quite capture it, this is truly a first rate establishment. I feel deeply grateful and appreciative for all their help.

I’ve been seeing Rod for a shoulder injury that I have had issues with for years now. I’ve seen a number of physio’s, chiro’s and osteo’s for this issue with little or temporary relief.
He’s the first to be able to really get to the source of the problem that many others overlooked. I have seen massive improvement in my movement, mobility and overall ability to get back to working out and can’t say enough good things about working with Rod.

I had an appointment with Rodrigo Almeida and I must say this was by far the worse Osteo session I ever had. He has no idea what he's doing, barely pressures a few points and after 20 mins tells you ok we're done. What a rip-off, I cannot believe I paid $214 for this absolute joke!

The team at Ace Sports Clinic is collaborative between physio, osteo and massage therapy. We are working on a long term solution to my acute injury which involves progressive mobility and strength exercises and they are there for me when there needs more of a  rescuing treatment.

name: Maintaining Independence - Occupational Therapy Services
description:
We travel from over 3 hours away to see Stephanie, she is amazing and a great professional who genuinely cares and as a parent she gives you hope! Highly recommended

Stephanie is an amazing OT. Very knowledgeable and professional. I highly recommend anyone looking for a paediatric OT in the Muskoka and Parry Sound area to check her out!

name: Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation
description:
After my recent accident, Crystal, Luc, and Maverick were exceptionally thorough and thoughtful in their care for myself. I have had family members visit this site, and have heard good reviews from them as well. Thank you for the easily accessible great care, close to home!!

If I could rate this place and the services I received - 5 stars I would rate my experience here a -5 stars.

I had two sessions with Crystal and found her to be professional and knowledgeable. She took the time to work through my concerns and provided helpful treatment during both visits. The clinic is clean, organized, and the staff are friendly. I appreciate the care I received and would recommend the clinic to others seeking physiotherapy support.

Very professional and accommodating to any needs.

They are a outstanding team, giving support and always very understanding I’m fortunate to have them

name: Hotel Dieu Shaver Health and Rehabilitation Centre
address: 541 Glenridge Avenue, St. Catharines, ON L2T 4C2
description:
The staff here were wonderful with my husband. Very caring, answered all my questions quickly and made me feel very at ease. Doctor Arvinte was amazing.  She introduced herself to all of our family and answered all their questions. My husband had the best care possible

Thoroughly impressed with the services and care provided for me at Shaver after my knee replacement surgery. Systematic & professional in the rehab services they provided in every aspect. Community care at its very best- way to go Hotel Dieu Shaver!

Shaver is like a breath of fresh air. My family member immediately began to thrive in the larger room, appropriate room mates and excellent staff involvement. Rehab is fairly intensive and appropriate for current physical and cognitive functioning. The grounds are conducive to healing with a garden like setting. I couldn’t be more pleased after seeing my mother in Welland rehab or my aunt at Fort Erie rehab ( where my cousin was told my aunt was lazy and wouldn’t try to walk…… then my cousin noted my aunts broken hip). So I am extremely pleased with Shaver. Excellent facility with excellent staff

The people are lovely there.  As a rehabilitative hospital, they strive for their patients to get better and have normal life restored.  For loved ones who have particular tastes for food, this may be difficult for them.  Would suggest working with your care team and helping where you can.  Help with grooming and outside time, as conditions/circumstances allow, are one of the best things that you can do since the care team will be focused on the rehabilitative aspect, which is not always pleasant.

My Mom was a patient after her brain aneurysm 8 years ago and we are still mortified about the experience she had here.  I drove an hour a day to get there and an hour back to take care of my mom because of the filth and lack of care and concern here.  I showed up with my cleaning supplies, food, and hygiene products to take care of my mom.  When I passed the staff they were typically sitting there on their phones or laughing together.  They are so bad, my mom ended up back in the emergency after I expressed extreme concern about her.  Her sodium levels bottomed out and she was hallucinating and no one even noticed !!!  I could wrote an entire book about how horrifying this place is.  When my mom started to come around, she began to take care of the other patients in the room.  Mom is a retired nurse and it was a complete disgrace to see the way she was treated after decades of caring for others.   This place should be investigated!

name: Scarborough South Physio and Rehab Centre
description:
Great clinic. I was in an MVA and was referred by a friend. I appreciate the customer service from the ladies at front desk. My physiotherapist, Yasmine, is tentative and professional, yet personable. we have a good relationship and I look forward to seeing her each week. My 1 hour appt consists of 20 minutes with my therapist, 20 mins strength training in the gym and 20 mins with TENS machine and heating pad. I go elsewhere for chiro and massage but they offer those services too. 100% would recommend.

I can’t recommend this Scarborough South  physiotherapy and Rehabilitation clinic highly enough! The team took the time to thoroughly assess my condition, clearly explain what was going on, and create a treatment plan tailored specifically to my needs. The therapist Heta Shukla is not only highly skilled, but also incredibly kind and encouraging. Every session was focused, effective, and motivating.
The clinic itself is welcoming, professional, and well-organized, making each visit a positive experience.
If you’re looking for compassionate, expert physiotherapy with real results, this is absolutely the place to go. I’m so grateful for the care I’ve received!

The staff are very kind and engaging, and they always make you feel welcome. Also very accommodating with appointments and individual needs. The clinicians and assistants are hands-on, attentive and provide excellent care, from treatment sessions all the way through properly guiding you with the exercises. They helped me a lot with my back pain and I’ve noticed a big improvement since I started my treatment there. Highly recommended!

I had a great experience with Heta for physiotherapy for my back. Each session starts with massage to ease muscle tension, followed by targeted exercises tailored to my condition, and finishes with ultrasound therapy to support healing.

Heta is professional, knowledgeable, and makes the whole process comfortable. The few sessions I had with Dr. Justin were great as well, and Saleha is excellent in guiding me through the exercises. The front desk ladies are always welcoming and helpful, making every visit smooth and pleasant.
I’ve seen clear improvement in my back pain, mobility, and strength. Highly recommend this clinic!

I have been here for my knee physiotherapy and I couldn’t be happier with the care I have received. Heta and Dr Justin takes time to explain every exercise and treatment clearly. I have already noticed significant improvement in my knee pain and mobility.

A special thanks to saleha as well who has been incredibly supportive during my exercise session. She makes sure I am doing everything correctly.

The entirely clinic has welcoming and professional atmosphere. I highly recommend this place to anyone looking for qua Physiotherapy care!!

name: Ajax Rehabilitation Centre
description:
Very friendly staff,(10/10 )and great service. Zeel Modi is always very helpful and offers great advice. She has helped me with shoulder and lower back issues. Even the most stubborn ones. Zeel's approach was both thorough and knowledgeable; she took the time to understand my specific concerns and tailored the sessions accordingly. Her professionalism and expertise were evident throughout the process. I really appreciate her work and time. I highly recommend to everyone.

"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 5/5 stars!
"Bhavna Parmar at Ajax Rehabilitation Centre is amazing! She's very knowledgeable and caring. She thoroughly assessed the issue, used the right tools, and worked her magic with her hands to fix the problem. Highly recommend!" 😊 thank you so much for helping me getting better

I wanted to express my gratitude for the incredible support that Bhavna has shown at Ajax Rehabilitative Centre. Her attentiveness, patience, and compassion have made a significant difference. The kindness and positivity you bring to every interaction—always with a warm smile—create an environment of comfort and trust. My progress would not have been possible without your dedication and genuine care. Thank you for going above and beyond for me and all your clients.

We were referred to Ajax Rehab Centre by a friend in July. The staff are very good and friendly. The physiotherapist, Bhavna Parmar is simply wonderful. My wife looks up to her weekly visit every Tuesday and has been recovering well.
Good job Ajax Rehab Centre.

This place feels like a scam. I had a one-hour initial session today for my back injury, and the physiotherapist didn’t even take the time to properly diagnose my condition before starting treatment. Most of the session was handled by student staff who offered little to no guidance — they didn’t seem to care whether I was doing the exercises correctly.
In the entire one-hour session, all I got were three basic exercises (which I already knew), a hot pack that anyone could easily use at home, and about 10 minutes of ultrasound. That’s not proper treatment — that’s just running a business. It’s disappointing to see the focus on billing and using up insurance coverage instead of genuinely helping patients recover.

name: Whitby Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation Centre
description:
Over the last few weeks, I have been working with Afshan to overcome an issue I have. With her pleasant personality and commitment to improving my outcome, I'm am seeing a marked improvement. Afshan reviews my progress and always questions me about my consistency with exercises and is concerned with any challenges, pain, or questions I may have. She adjusts my exercises to accommodate on a weekly basis as well as gauging my strength and mobility on my weekly appointments.
I highly recommend Afshan to anyone with any ailment as she is keen to improve your circumstances. Thanks Afshan!!

Highly Recommend Afshan Panjwani– Exceptional Physiotherapist!

I’ve had an excellent experience with Afshan. She is knowledgeable, patient, and truly cares about her patients’ recovery. From the very first session, she took the time to listen carefully, assess my condition thoroughly, and explain each step of the treatment plan in a way that was easy to understand.

Her approach is both professional and compassionate — she motivates you to improve while making sure every exercise is done safely and effectively. Thanks to her guidance and expertise, I’ve noticed a significant improvement in my mobility and overall well-being.

Afshan’s positive attitude and genuine concern make every visit pleasant and encouraging. I’m very grateful for her support and would highly recommend her to anyone looking for an experienced and caring physiotherapist!

I had a very positive physiotherapy experience with Munpreet Singh. He was professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely attentive to my needs. Munpreet took the time to explain everything clearly and tailored the treatment to help me improve quickly. I felt supported throughout the process and noticed real progress thanks to his guidance. I’d definitely recommend Munpreet to anyone looking for quality physiotherapy care.

Munpreet Singh did an unbelievably amazing job with helping me with my crippling calcaneus fracture! He’s very professional, courteous, and honest. 100% recommend Minpreet Singh for the best treatment you will receive.

Both a shoulder and hamstring tear injury brought me here. I had an excellent experience being healed by Brad. Both the ladies at the desk Kayla, Saranya are kind and knew my appointments by name and time better than my own schedule.

I mad massages from both Ms. Brittney and Ms. Sam and my health has never been better.

Strongly recommend any recovering athlete to come to this location!

name: Scarborough Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation Centre
description:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Scarborough Physiotherapy – Highly Recommended.

I recently visited Scarborough Physiotherapy for an ankle injury, and I’m truly impressed with the care and professionalism I received. The clinic is well-planned, organized, and creates a comfortable environment for recovery. I started seeing improvements almost immediately, and my recovery has been progressing exceptionally well.

A huge shout-out to Physiotherapist Sanchita Singh , she is incredibly knowledgeable, attentive, and genuinely invested in her patients’ healing. She puts so much effort into every session, ensuring you understand your progress and feel supported throughout.

I also want to sincerely thank Vinisha and Irah her assistants, for the wonderful service and friendly approach. They play a big role in making each visit smooth and pleasant.

Overall, I highly recommend Scarborough Physiotherapy for anyone seeking effective treatment and excellent care. 🙏

I’ve been seeing Dr. Andrew for the past two months and I’m truly impressed with the progress I’ve made. He is incredibly knowledgeable, attentive, and genuinely cares about his patients’ recovery. The entire team at Scarborough Physiotherapy and Rehab is amazing — from the assistants to the administrative staff, everyone is friendly, professional, and supportive. This is hands down the best physio clinic I’ve been to. Highly recommend!

Such a great experience with everyone involved. The receptionists whom are super nice and friendly, the physio team are very personable and professional and of course Shreya my physio therapist who has provided me outstanding care and consideration for my pain. I am happy to say after 2 years of pain I have had minimal episodes after only 8 sessions. I highly recommend

Sanchita has been very creative with my rehab, developing a personalized treatment plan that addressed my specific needs, using manual manipulation, stretches, and a full set of exercises. My recovery is slow and I'm confident in my further progress because of the work I'm doing with her.
She is knowledgeable, patient and attentive. Every session with her leaves me feeling better, both physically and mentally. It’s like she intuitively knows exactly what my body needs and how to bring relief.
Sanchita is the right example of a skilled professional and emotionally aware practitioner.
I am grateful to have found someone who not only treats the symptoms but genuinely cares about your overall health. I Highly, highly recommend.
I big thank you to the entire team and admins!

I have been receiving a therapy for my back injury in this clinic for the last three months with Sanchita Singh.
I am really satisfied with her professionalism and best treatment I ever experienced I want to say thank you for sanchita and all of your staff.

name: Oshawa Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation Centre
description:
I have been attending OPARC since early December 2025 (following a car accident) and though I have not yet completed my rehabbing I wanted to give my comments as to my experience to date! From the start I have found the staff and general atmosphere to be very welcoming!! In addition to being very friendly the staff are knowledgeable and both clear in their instructions and patient. It is therefore very relaxing being there and I am encouraged by my progress to date. Tas is my primary and she carefully listens to all that I have to say and understands what it is I need to do to get myself back to where I was prior to the accident. She is very thorough in explaining what I need to know and in ensuring that she is understanding what I have said. I believe she is very compassionate in her manner. My success to date speaks well for what they have to offer at OPARC.😀👍

I am a new patient to OPARC, but am by no means new to physiotherapy. I chose OPARC for my own convenience, as it was the closest facility to my home.
I have had two physiotherapy appts. so far with Bindu and the team, and my first visit for massage was today with Brennan.
I am completely/thoroughly satisfied with the care I have received so far, and would recommend OPARC, very highly to anyone in need of their services.
From Jodi at the front desk, and  everyone else I’ve seen thus far, the level of customer care, professionalism, and knowledge is at the top of its game. It’s nice to find people who genuinely care not only about what they do, but truly care for the clients themselves.

Barry Noble-Gresty

I just wanted to leave a quick review of my Phisotherapy with Munpreet Singh
He did an absolutely amazing job healing my body. The service provided by Munpreet and the Gym staff where all very professional and effective.  I would highly recommend your services to all my family and friends.  The Ladies on the front desk were also very friendly and helpfull with any concerns I had.
Munpreet went a extra mile when he said "if I hurt myself again while in my winter home, he would gladly work with a therapist there through email."Now that is excellent customer support.

Sincerely

Frank Hoar

Staff is friendly and seems caring. The place is very large and clean. Sometimes they'll be quite busy and I've had to wait a bit but no big deal. They bill my insurance company directly too making things easier for me.

The staff there are very kind courteous attentive and professional. I highly recommend the Oshawa Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation therapist a place to go when you are hurt and need therapy and massages to get you back in shape.

name: Focus Physiotherapy - York Clinic
description:
From the moment you walk in, the entire team makes you feel welcome and cared for. The staff are professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely dedicated to helping you recover and feel your best. Every visit has been a great experience from Shanti at the front with her warm welcome to Nico and Marek who take the time to explain things clearly and create a treatment plan for you. I highly recommend Focus Physiotherapy to anyone looking for quality care — you’ll be in great hands with their entire team!

I am a patient myself here. It has been very helpful since I have attended the programs. I see myself recovering well. I can see a big difference before I started the programs and now that I am attending the programs; when It comes doing the house chores etc. Shantie the secretary is very nice and helpful and all ofrece there staffs are nice and helpful like Alison and Jil. I really recommend others to come to this place👍

I saw Alison a few years ago for a thumb/wrist injury. She was so lovely, and the exercises she gave me really helped me recover. Highly recommend!

My experience at Focus Physiotherapy has been great so far. I didn't imagine my self needing physiotherapy,  however accidents can happen at anytime. The staff  here are amazing.  They are kind, caring, friendly and most of all very professional. I would truly recommend them to anyone who needs physiotherapy care. They  truly care about helping you to feel better and get back to your normal life as much as possible. Thank you focus physiotherapy 🙏🙏🙏

The staff at Focus Physiotherapy - York is very nice, kind and professional. They take good care of me and help me with whatever I need. The receptionist, Shantie is very good at what she does, she always reviews my documents I receive from the insurance and explain what each document is. She's always available whenever I need help. I would recommend anyone to come here.

name: The Consistory Club - Fairmont United Church
description:
Lunar Bliss events held in this space is perfect. Room to grow with complimentary parking. Warm commUNITY space,  crafted with passion and purpose by local artists, Shane and Kim.

Nicely kept and maintained. Inviting atmosphere

Went to the London Consistory club for a nearly new walker.

equipment for handycap.  bus serve out front

Just because it feels very comfortable n friendly people

name: Ontario Renovates Program
address: City of London - Housing Programs & Services
description:
The system is broken. Affordable housing should be accessible to everyone!
I shouldn’t have to give 90% of my monthly income for market rent because I’m “ineligible” for AFFORDABLE housing.
Because basically once the government takes their share of my income, I can barely afford my rent as is so I’m not sure why eligibility is before tax.
Thanks London government for contributing to homelessness.

They make an intake call which is already hard for tenting ppl so I have to fine bus money to get to a family or friends phone and I wait 3 hours past my phone call time that THEY ARRANGED THE TIME FOR AND DATE  but ditch me. Nice london housing help!

Not only that they won't give housing looking at your low income the staff won’t even answer you’re simple questions and shut you down by saying you’re way far in the list I applied in 2018 and still no house for me? I also asked if there’s any other option the answer was simply no we can help you.

Had no issues until today I waited on hold for over thirty minutes for the call to be terminated before I even managed to speak to anyone

name: East Toronto Orthopaedic & Sports Injury Clinic
address: 1577 Danforth Avenue, Unit 4, Toronto, ON, M4C 1H7
description:
I’ve been seeing Trevor for over six months for lower back and sciatica pain, and I can’t recommend him highly enough. He’s friendly, patient, and always adapts the treatment to whatever my body needs that day, especially during flareups when I’m in acute pain.

The clinic itself is clean, and well-equipped, and Trevor consistently makes the whole experience comfortable and effective. He also created several personalized exercise plans for me on their app, which has been incredibly useful when I can’t make it into the clinic or when I’m traveling.

My mobility and pain levels have improved significantly since starting with him. If you’re dealing with back issues or sciatic pain, Trevor is absolutely worth seeing. Highly recommend!

Highly recommend Nick!  He's an excellent physio - knowledgeable, kind and always manages to make you laugh.  He makes every session enjoyable while still being incredibly professional.  I noticed improvement quickly and couldn't ask for better care.

Trevor is an exceptional physiotherapist. He’s knowledgeable, patient, and truly committed to helping you heal. He listens, adapts treatment to what you actually need, and is always flexible with scheduling. The clinic itself has a great community vibe, and the front desk staff are always friendly and organized, which makes every visit easy and stress-free. I’ve made real progress thanks to Trevor, and I couldn’t recommend him more.

I can’t thank my physiotherapist Nikhil Taneja enough for the incredible care I received after fracturing my left ankle. From day one, he was professional, knowledgeable, and truly dedicated to my recovery. He explained every step of the process, gave me clear exercises to follow, and always made sure I felt supported and confident along the way.

Thanks to his expertise and encouragement, I regained my strength and mobility much faster than I expected. He genuinely cares about his patients and goes above and beyond to ensure the best results. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of physiotherapy—he’s amazing at what he does!

Nakhil was great and patient with my son. He was able to build a reppor and increase the challenge in exercises as recovery went on.

Downside the treatment rooms are on the smaller side. It can be busy and noisy at times.

name: Trilogy Physiotherapy - West
address: 10 Neighbourhood Lane, Unit 6B, Etobicoke, ON, M8Y 0A4
description:
Working with Jason through a knee injury made the entire experience significantly more manageable. The progress was steady and sustainable even from the very first sessions. With patience, practice, and persistence we went through movement and mobility recovery in a way that got my confidence back to now be back into resistance-based, cardio, as well as hybrid training, plus the usual runs. Plus, the entire team is very courteous, knowledgeable, and very supportive! I’d confidently recommend Trilogy Physiotherapy: if your experience is at least half as good as mine, I know you are in good hands and will soon be back in good health!

I have been a client at Trilogy Physiotherapy for over two years, dating back to when the clinic was located on Prince Edward Drive. During this time, I have received both physiotherapy and massage therapy services.

I would like to extend my sincere appreciation to MADDIE,  my massage therapist. She is not only highly skilled and professional in her practice, but also an exceptionally compassionate and empathetic individual. Her dedication to her clients is evident in the quality of care she provides, and she consistently goes above and beyond to ensure the best possible treatment outcomes. This level of commitment and genuine concern is rare and truly commendable.

Although the clinic’s current location is farther from my home, I continue to travel there specifically because of the excellent care I receive from MADDIE. I am very grateful for her outstanding service and unwavering professionalism.

Thank you, MADDIE, for your exceptional care and dedication. 😀

I’ve been a patient at West Trilogy Physiotherapy for almost two years now, seeing Jason, and I can’t say enough good things about him. Jason is extremely diligent, professional, and patient. He truly takes the time to understand your needs and never rushes through an appointment.

As a woman who has PCOS, and developed poor posture and a noticeable hunch in my back, I was nervous about treatment, but Jason made me feel completely safe, comfortable, and supported. He has helped me tremendously with simple, effective at-home exercises that fit my pace and feel manageable. He even took the extra step of helping me find the right pillow for sleeping, which has significantly improved my sleep quality.

I see him once a week, and I always feel noticeably better after each session. Jason is clearly very experienced and knowledgeable, and I trust him completely with my care. I highly recommend Jason and West Trilogy Physiotherapy to anyone looking for a physiotherapist who is professional, attentive, and genuinely cares about their patients.

I’ve been to a few physios over the years and Jason is by far the best. With over 20 years of experience, it shows in how thorough and knowledgeable he is. His assessments are detailed, his explanations are clear, and everything is tailored to you as an individual.

As an athlete getting into the middle stages of life, mobility and tightness have been big challenges for me. After just a short time working with him, I’m already feeling a noticeable difference. He doesn’t just treat the issue — he focuses on long-term performance and keeping you competing at a high level.

Highly recommend Jason to anyone serious about their health and movement.

I really had a great experience with Jennifer and Trilogy. They were all very professional, courteous, and thorough. I could feel the exercises making my knee stronger and stronger by the week, and even my specialist was very impressed with the outcome. It can be hard to find a good physiotherepy clinic, feeling more like negotiating your way through used car dealerships, but Trilogy put me at ease. Jennifer built up a suite of exercises not only for my right meniscus tear (which I had been sent for) but also the arthritis in my left knee, and left me confident in my mobility for the first time in probably years. 10/10 I would recommend this clinic for all of your physiotherapy needs!

name: Bay and College Physiotherapy & Rehab
address: 790 Bay Street, Suite 105, Toronto, ON M5G 1N8
description:
Great experience and great vibes from Dr. Alessandro Petitti! I went in there with the expection of fixing my back and neck muscle strain/stiffness and he delivered! :D
Plus I'm under the studentcare program and they gave out HUGE discount for program members, so I ended up paying out-of-pocket for only $8 for the initial assessment and $5 for the follow-up (The rest were covered by my insurance but still cheap nontheless!) :3
Definitely recommend it to everyone! And remember to check your posture~

I have been gojng to Bay and College Physiotherapy for 3months after a car accident.  They are 👍 👌 great. From the reception to the Physiotherapy therapist and massage therapist they were very professional,  courteous and helpful.  I am in much better shape after the accident because of them. Please give them a try! As my therapy ends I want to thank Bay and College Physiotherapy 🙏

I thoroughly enjoy this Clinic. I enjoy Garima as a physiotherapist as well as Farhana and Inara.

Anna the new massage therapist is a treat. As I have been recovering from my car, Accident, I have found the team to be very helpful and accommodating

I got a last-minute cancellation on the same day as the appointment from the clinic. I already had done arrangements for someone to take care of my kid, and all I get is a crappy email (not even a phone call) saying it got cancelled.

I bet if it was me cancelling the appointment the day-of, you guys would quickly try to enforce your cancellation policy. But since I am the customer, I get screwed.

Terrible service. Your receptionist doesn't have any idea of what customer service is.

Great experience with chiropractor. The reception was friendly and understanding, ended up paying 65 bucks for the session and they gave me 15 minutes free massage

name: Spark Rehabilitation
address: 589 Second Line E, Sault Ste. Marie, ON, P6B 4K2
description:
Cannot say enough about this practice. Danielle Lukenda has nursed me back to health twice now with two hip injuries. Fast and speedy recovery getting me back out into the running world very quickly. Her receptionist are lovely as well. Highly recommend spark back in motion physiotherapy.

Danielle is fantastic! Right exercises to do, very nice person. So easy to get along with.
This is my place now

This clinic is amazing you will find all the services you need in one place!

Great service. Good therapists.

name: Triangle Physiotherapy
address: 1 The East Mall Crescent, Etobicoke, ON M9B 6G8, Canada
description:
I had an ankle injury and was fortunate to work with Siddhi at Triangle Physiotherapy for my recovery. From the very first appointment, she was attentive, thorough, and incredibly knowledgeable. She took the time to explain my injury and created a clear, personalized treatment plan that made me feel confident and supported throughout the process.

Thanks to her expertise and encouragement, my ankle has improved significantly, and I feel much stronger and more stable. Siddhi is professional, compassionate, and truly dedicated to her patients’ progress. I’m very grateful for her care and would highly recommend her to anyone seeking excellent physiotherapy.

I had a great experience with Siddhi. I originally came in for lower back pain, and she took the time to properly assess the issue and create a clear treatment plan. The sessions included targeted exercises and therapies, and I quickly felt a significant improvement. Siddhi was professional, knowledgeable, and always explained the purpose behind the treatments and exercises. I’m very happy with the progress and would definitely recommend her to others.

I’ve had an amazing experience with Zill Patel, my physiotherapist. She has been incredibly effective in addressing my pain areas and took the time to understand my concerns thoroughly. The exercises she recommended have helped me improve significantly over time. Zill is extremely professional, calm, polite, and genuinely caring — I always feel well-supported and confident in her treatment.
I would also like to extend a big thank you to Vishakha, the front desk angel. She is always so friendly and helpful, and she handles every question or concern with such excellence. My follow up bookings are made easier with her assistance. Her warm and welcoming attitude makes every visit smoother and more pleasant.
Highly recommend this clinic — exceptional care from start to finish!

Zill is absolutely amazing. I had an incredible experience with her. She truly helped me with my back pain, and I’m so grateful for her care. She is very professional, patient, and absolutely amazing at what she does. Every session was well-explained, tailored to my needs, and I always left feeling better and more confident in my recovery. I highly recommend her to anyone looking for real results and exceptional treatment. Also the reception team, super welcoming, organized, and helpful with scheduling and questions. You can tell they work as an amazing team with the therapists, and it makes the whole clinic feel positive and professional. Highly recommend!

The front desk team is very well organized, and very friendly. They aim to please! I see everyone coming and going as clients, in a good mood. Rasika has been wonderful with pelvic therapy and also helping me with my right knee. I am very satisfied with Triangle therapy!

name: Ministry of Long-Term Care — Long-Term Care Inspections Branch
description:
Miniter of health the disabl community need your help and your  Immediate attention I'm paralyzed and the only way to get around is my equipment (wheelchair)  Thank you for the quick funding For people like us But we have a problem. We need your help  For policing Those found and make sure the client received the correct equipment on the time that has been set I'm waiting for my equipment for the last 3 years and no one explained to me why The delay Knowing that this equipment has been paid for it in full 3 years ago By the health department and special need ADP.  And the brand new wheelchair I received It's useless I fall off it 3 times   It's wrong size and wrong balance center of gravity  Can you help please
With all the respect Badri

Not clear the full address

Very very very poor service

name: Anishnawbe Health Toronto
description:
Been coming here since I moved here and was in their oshki program
For me the sense of community has been there since day one. If I need anything I will always be supported.
The hub is more accessible than the old locations was for me and I have all my providers in one spot which makes it easier.
Miigwetch AHT team

Ps I included some pictures of the new building

I tried to contact them because my long lost mother has been using their services. They refuse to answer or help. I was using their services and had a worker, then once they found out who my mother was they started dropping and ignoring me. They seperated us on purpose and caused more issues. Worst place for natives in all of canada imo.

They never answer the phone no matter what time of day it is...When I finally got in contact with someone to help me move, Chelsea ruined everything for me.

Story:
I called weeks prior to schedule the movers and she said the date and time and confirmed in email as well. Then the day of my move, they didn't show up and she called me to tell me she never booked it hence why I paid $1000 last minute to get my stuff over the next day. I filled out the entire application as well only to be told that I don't qualify for anything because I don't have a disability and I'm not an old time client. (I've been a client for over 5 years and had help moving before so I don't get the issue?). I asked for an exception and for a refund but she said she couldn't help me.

TLDR: Chelsea screwed me over with my move and I paid $1000. Don't even bother with these people to help you with housing. I'm going to tell my Reserve this establishment does not help native people and they are a FRAUD.

5 stars for the architecture and for the incredible public art/ sculpture !!!!

very helpful caring staff except when making appointments to see your dr its 3 weeks away but other then that its a very warm caring place:) kristie is the best very helpful.
